bonusPolicy.pageSubtitle: Manage attendance bonuses and fixed monthly bonuses
bonusPolicy.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to deactivate this policy?
bonusPolicy.confirmHardDelete: ⚠️ This will permanently delete the policy. This action cannot be undone.
bonusPolicy.confirmActivate: Are you sure you want to activate this policy?

rules.title: Bonus Rules
rules.atLeastOne: At least one bonus type must be enabled

attendanceBonus.label: Attendance Bonus
attendanceBonus.desc: Reward employees who meet attendance conditions

fixedBonus.label: Fixed Monthly Bonus
fixedBonus.desc: A fixed amount added to salary every month

notes.title: How Bonuses Work
notes.priority2: Employees who work in more than one department have their department priority ignored. Similarly, those who work in more than one branch have their branch priority ignored.
notes.attendance: Attendance Bonus: employee must meet all conditions (absences, late days, late minutes, unpaid days)
notes.fixed: Fixed Bonus: paid every month, optionally only if no unpaid leave
notes.exceptional: Exceptional Bonus: added manually by admin per employee per day (stored in OvertimeEntry)
